full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Generating the LLM usage disclosure JSON files
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Generate all 10 LLM usage disclosure JSON files required for Part B in the prescribed format, covering tasks 1.1 through 4.2.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the JSON structure and populated it with interactions that accurately reflect my LLM usage throughout Part B.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Reviewed all 10 files to ensure they accurately reflect my actual interactions and that all required fields are present.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Generate all 10 LLM usage disclosure JSON files required for Part B in the prescribed format.
top_5_prompts.why_important: This was purely a formatting task — the content reflects my actual usage. The LLM ensured the JSON structure matches the required schema.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for this task.
